name: HAWTHORN BANCSHARES, INC.
summary: Hawthorn Bancshares, Inc. is a Missouri-based bank holding company and financial holding company that owns Hawthorn Bank, a full-service commercial bank with 18 banking offices. The Bank offers checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit, internet banking, debit cards, commercial and industrial loans, real estate loans, installment loans, brokerage services, and safety deposit boxes. The Company also operates a Wealth Management segment providing financial planning, investment planning, and trust services.

products.name: Checking and Savings Accounts
products.description: Standard deposit accounts offered to retail and commercial customers.

products.name: Certificates of Deposit
products.description: Time deposit products offered to customers.

products.name: Debit Cards
products.description: Debit card services for account holders.

products.name: Commercial and Industrial Loans
products.description: Lending services for commercial and industrial borrowers.

products.name: Residential and Commercial Real Estate Loans
products.description: Mortgage and commercial real estate lending products.

products.name: Installment and Personal Loans
products.description: Single payment personal and installment loan products.

products.name: Brokerage Services
products.description: Investment brokerage services offered through the Bank.

products.name: Wealth Management and Trust Services
products.description: Financial and investment planning services for individuals and business owners, including trust services.
